name: PRISMA/Systematic Review Flow PPT Image Template
description: Reference-image driven flow diagram template for PRISMA-like screening, filtering, evaluation, and audit workflows.

typography.header: small bold sans-serif inside yellow bars

shapes.content_box: white rectangle with thin black border

page_types.name: Screening Flow
page_types.layout_archetype: two-column PRISMA-like flow with yellow top headers, left vertical stage labels, white boxes, and arrows

reference_images.allowed_use: layout, color, box rhythm, arrow structure

reference_roles.description: Use the PRISMA-like two-column flow, left stage rail, stacked boxes, branches, and arrow topology.
Use the clean academic systematic-review flowchart tone with thin black strokes and high whitespace.
Use yellow header bars, pale-blue stage labels, white nodes, black text, and black arrows.
Use compact readable sans-serif Chinese labels in boxes and stage tags.
Use only the workflow-stage pattern; do not copy source facts, counts, or labels.

prompt_recipe.style: PRISMA-like systematic review flow: yellow top headers, white boxes, thin black borders, black arrows, blue vertical stage labels.
prompt_recipe.content_policy: Use user-supplied flow content; do not copy the original reference image's study counts or labels.
prompt_recipe.text_policy: Chinese-first replacement text; keep boxes readable and avoid microtext.
